Dashboard › Pillar › KPI

Sources & disclosures

  • KPI content recreated from the official El Paso County Strategic Plan Dashboard.
  • Budget figures from the El Paso County 2026 Adopted Budget.
  • Methodology descriptions paraphrased from published Department of Public Works material and Strategic Plan Success documentation.
  • Proposed metrics (Road Service Operations) and unpublished pillars (Health & Safety) are labeled clearly; the County does not currently publish these.
  • This page is a citizen-built design demonstration. Not affiliated with El Paso County or its Department of Public Works.
